title: Failure Modes Are Patterns
prompt: Ask how the system can repeatedly fail across data, model, objective, interface, workflow, infrastructure, and governance layers.

title: Monitor for Harm, Not Only Uptime
prompt: Include appeals, incidents, subgroup outcomes, overrides, drift, and remediation status in monitoring.

title: Fail Visibly and Recoverably
prompt: Design fallback, rollback, escalation, repair, and post-incident learning before deployment.
